description: Queries a URL in AlienVault OTX.

outputs.description: The URL. AlienVaultOTX.URL.Hostname The host name of the URL.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: The domain of the URL. AlienVaultOTX.URL.Alexa The domain data for the Alexa URL.
outputs.name: AlienVaultOTX.URL.Domain

outputs.description: Url AlienVaultOTX.URL.Whois The Whois URL for domain data.
outputs.name: AlienVaultOTX.URL.Url

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The source of the relationship. URL.Relationships.EntityB The destination of the relationship.
outputs.name: URL.Relationships.EntityA

outputs.description: The name of the relationship. URL.Relationships.EntityAType The type of the source of the relationship.
outputs.name: URL.Relationships.Relationship

outputs.description: The type of the destination of the relationship.
outputs.name: URL.Relationships.EntityBType
